title: Storyboard Flow
description: A flow file provides the data context for a prototype page. It can reference objects via $ref and merge globals via $global. Any additional properties become the flow data consumed by components.

meta.description: Flow metadata for display in the flows menu.

title.description: Display title for this flow in the flows menu.

description.description: Short description of this flow's purpose or state.

default.description: When true, this flow is loaded by default for its route.

route.description: Explicit route path this flow targets. If omitted, the route is inferred from the file location.

$global.description: Array of object names to merge into the flow root. Flow values take precedence on conflicts.
